 -fno-omit-frame-pointer -mno-omit-leaf-frame-pointer -Wp,-D_GLIBCXX_ASSERTIONS -g -ffile-prefix-map=/run/media/robin/robinScard/codingStuff/arch-unity7/pkgbuilds/unity-base/compiz/src=/usr/src/debug/compiz -flto=auto -fPIC -Wall -Wno-unused-local-typedefs -Wno-deprecated-declarations  -Wno-subobject-linkage -fPIC -Wall -Wno-unused-local-typedefs -Wno-deprecated-declarations  -Wno-subobject-linkage -Wno-subobject-linkage -fPIC -Wall -Wno-unused-local-typedefs -Wno-deprecated-declarations  -Wno-subobject-linkage -Wno-subobject-linkage -Wno-subobject-linkage -O2 -g -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-O1 -Wl,--sort-common -Wl,--as-needed -Wl,-z,relro -Wl,-z,now          -Wl,-z,pack-relative-relocs -flto=auto -Wl,-zdefs -Wl,-zdefs -Wl,-zdefs -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/compiz_core.dir/link.d
